game_info.title: v1
game_info.concept: **DEEMO**: Players interact with a vertical scrolling interface where musical notes descend from the top of the screen towards a horizontal judgment line at the bottom. Tapping a single note as it aligns with the judgment line registers a hit, while holding and releasing long notes at the correct timing, or swiping horizontally across multiple connected notes, executes specific musical phrases. Successful and accurate note execution contributes to a score and a combo multiplier, with performance graded from "Charming" to "Miss," and completing songs contributes to the growth of a central tree in the story mode, adding 0.5m to 2.0m to its height per play. Reaching specific tree heights (e.g., 5m, 10m, 20m) unlocks new story scenes, additional playable songs from a library of over 220 tracks, and new explorable areas containing hidden elements. Each song offers multiple difficulty levels (Easy, Normal, Hard), increasing the density and complexity of note patterns, requiring faster reflexes and more precise timing, with the primary objective being to achieve the highest possible score and maintain a continuous combo for optimal tree growth and story progression.
game_info.description: Guide the growth of a mystical tree by performing musical notes with precise timing. Notes descend from above and must be hit exactly when they reach the judgment line. Different note types require tapping, holding, or swiping across multiple notes. Build combos for higher scores and faster tree growth. Reach tree height milestones to unlock new songs and story scenes. Master three difficulty levels with increasingly complex patterns.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (←→): Move horizontally to align with notes
Space: Hit single notes / Start holding long notes
Z: Release held notes / Execute swipe notes
Shift: Alternative hit key for multi-note patterns
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic note hitting mechanics and validates that the player can successfully hit notes as they descend. Ensures collision detection works correctly and score increases appropriately.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Tracks incoming notes and positions the player directly under each note. Executes hit action (Space) when notes reach the judgment line within the timing window. Moves between lanes efficiently to catch consecutive notes.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully hits most notes with "Perfect" or "Great" timing. Score increases steadily, combo counter rises, and no critical errors occur. The test validates core gameplay mechanics function correctly.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic note hitting mechanics and validates that the player can successfully hit notes as they descend. Ensures collision detection works correctly and score increases appropriately.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully hits most notes with "Perfect" or "Great" timing. Score increases steadily, combo counter rises, and no critical errors occur. The test validates core gameplay mechanics function correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal gameplay to achieve win condition by reaching target tree height. Validates that perfect play leads to story progression and game completion. Tests all note types including holds and swipes.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Implements perfect timing strategy to hit all notes with maximum accuracy. Maintains continuous combo throughout songs. Prioritizes high-value notes and executes hold notes for full duration. Completes multiple songs to accumulate tree growth.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state by reaching target tree height (20m). Maintains high combo multipliers throughout gameplay. Unlocks all available songs and story scenes. Demonstrates that the win condition is achievable through skilled play.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests movement and positioning mechanics across all lanes. Validates that the player can move smoothly and position accurately under notes in different columns.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Systematically moves between all available lanes. Tests rapid lane switching and positioning accuracy. Validates that player position updates correctly and responds to directional inputs.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates to all lanes without getting stuck. Position updates are smooth and responsive. Movement mechanics work consistently across the entire play area.
